name: Orange & Poppy Seed Individual Pound Cakes
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 cups unsalted butter, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Butter and flour four individual small loaf pans.
3. In a medium bowl, sift together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
4. In a large bowl, beat the sugar and unsalted butter until light and fluffy using an electric mixer.
5. Add the eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
6. Beat in the orange juice, grated orange peel, and vanilla extract (the batter may look curdled).
7. Gradually add the flour mixture to the bowl with the sugar and butter.
8. Fold in the poppy seeds.
9. Divide the batter equally among the prepared pans (about 1 1/2 cups each).
10. Place the pans in the oven and bake until the tops of the cakes are brown and a tester inserted into the center comes out clean, about 55 minutes.
11. Remove the pans from the oven and let them cool on wire racks for 10 minutes.
12. Cut around the sides of the pans to loosen the cakes.
13. Turn the cakes out onto wire racks and allow them to cool completely.
Cakes can be prepared up to 1 week ahead. Wrap in aluminum foil and store at room temperature.
